cases.title: SKILL.md file exists
cases.description: Verify that src/skills/install-package-builder/SKILL.md exists at the expected path.
cases.evidence: Static inspection confirmed src/skills/install-package-builder/SKILL.md exists and is readable.

cases.title: SKILL.md frontmatter has required fields
cases.description: Verify that SKILL.md frontmatter contains: name, description, user-invocable: true, license, metadata.author, metadata.version.
cases.evidence: SKILL.md frontmatter contains name, description, user-invocable: true, license: MIT, metadata.author, and metadata.version.
cases.spec: NFR-004: Skill MUST be user-invocable directly

cases.title: SKILL.md contains all required sections
cases.description: Verify that SKILL.md contains all required headings: Activation Contract, Pre-flight Check, Input Schema, Execution Steps, SQL Classification Rules, Hard Rules, Output Contract.
cases.evidence: SKILL.md contains Activation Contract, Pre-flight Check, Input Schema, Execution Steps, SQL Classification Rules, Hard Rules, and Output Contract headings.
cases.spec: spec: FR-001 through FR-012 — all pipeline stages must be instructed
cases.assertion: File contains headings: 'Activation Contract', 'Pre-flight Check', 'Input Schema', 'Execution Steps', 'SQL Classification Rules', 'Hard Rules', 'Output Contract'

cases.title: SKILL.md description field starts with 'Trigger:' and is ≤250 chars
cases.description: Verify that the description field in SKILL.md frontmatter starts with 'Trigger:' and does not exceed 250 characters.
cases.evidence: Frontmatter description starts with 'Trigger:' and is under 250 characters.
cases.spec: design: Skill-as-Instructions Pattern — matches existing repo skill conventions
cases.assertion: description: value starts with 'Trigger:' and total length ≤250 characters

cases.title: SKILL.md Execution Steps lists all 9 pipeline stages in order
cases.description: Verify that the Execution Steps section lists all 9 stages in order: preflight, clone, detect, build, classify, assemble, readme, zip, report.
cases.evidence: Execution Steps lists the 9 stages in order: Pre-flight, Clone/Pull, Detect stack, Build, Classify SQL, Assemble package, Generate README, Create Rollback structure, Zip and report.
cases.spec: design: Pipeline stages execute in strict order: preflight → clone → detect → build → classify → assemble → readme → zip → report
cases.assertion: Execution Steps section lists stages in order: preflight, clone, detect, build, classify, assemble, readme, zip, report

cases.title: SKILL.md SQL Classification Rules lists all 6 rules in precedence order
cases.description: Verify that SQL Classification Rules section lists all 6 rules in precedence order: Packages, Procedures, Types, Tables, Data, Unclassified.
cases.evidence: SQL Classification Rules lists Packages, Procedures, Types, Tables, Data, and Unclassified in precedence order with the required patterns.
cases.spec: spec: FR-006 — classification rules evaluated in order
cases.assertion: SQL Classification Rules section lists 6 rules in precedence order: Packages (PKS/PKB), Procedures (_PRC/SP_/PROC/_PROC), Types (_TYPE/TYPE_), Tables (_TAB/_TABLE/CREATE TABLE), Data (execution.sql/INSERT/UPDATE/MERGE), Unclassified

cases.title: readme-template.txt contains all required markers

cases.evidence: readme-template.txt contains all required placeholders: CHG_NUMBER, VERSION, DATE, AUTHOR, APP_NAME, APP_VERSION, REPO_URL, BRANCH, ENVIRONMENT_TABLE, INSTALL_STEPS, USER_STORIES, and CORRECTIONS.

cases.title: readme-template.txt contains the 4 required sections

cases.title: Adapter prompt (repo copy) exists
cases.description: Verify that agents/sdd/install-package-builder.md exists as the repo copy of the adapter prompt.
cases.evidence: Static inspection confirmed agents/sdd/install-package-builder.md exists and is readable.

cases.title: Adapter prompt instructs to read SKILL.md before starting
cases.description: Verify that the adapter prompt contains an instruction directing the agent to read or load SKILL.md before starting work.
cases.evidence: Adapter prompt instructs the executor to read src/skills/install-package-builder/SKILL.md before starting any task.
cases.spec: design: Skill-as-Instructions Pattern — LLM reads SKILL.md to execute pipeline
cases.assertion: File contains instruction to read or load SKILL.md (e.g. 'read', 'load', 'SKILL.md') before starting

cases.title: Adapter prompt does NOT contain pipeline logic
cases.description: Verify that the adapter prompt does not encode pipeline logic (git clone commands, mvn commands, SQL classification rules, etc.) — logic belongs in SKILL.md only.
cases.evidence: Adapter prompt only forwards inputs and points to SKILL.md; no git clone commands, mvn commands, SQL rule tables, or pipeline logic are encoded there.
cases.spec: design: Decision — Skill-as-Instructions Pattern: Encode all logic in SKILL.md
cases.assertion: File does not contain git clone commands, mvn commands, SQL classification rule tables, or pipeline step logic beyond 'read SKILL.md'

cases.title: AGENTS.md contains an entry for install-package-builder
cases.description: Verify that the project AGENTS.md file contains an entry documenting install-package-builder as a manual utility skill.
cases.evidence: AGENTS.md documents install-package-builder as a manual user-invocable utility and not an SDD DAG phase.
cases.spec: design: File Changes — AGENTS.md Modify: Document new skill as manual utility
